title: 5G’s 8-second socket trap
meta_description: Cut mobile write failures 89% by tuning Redis connection pools for 5G latency spikes — socket timeouts, deduplication, and Prometheus metrics you can deploy today.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams lose 4% of mobile writes to 5G handoffs because they tune for Wi-Fi.

https://kubaik.github.io/5gs-8-second-socket-trap
